name: Yohei Nakajima
headline: Builder of autonomous AI agents · creator of BabyAGI

evidence.title: babyagi — autonomous task-driven AI agent
evidence.description: A widely-referenced autonomous agent that uses an LLM to create, prioritize, and execute tasks in a loop toward an objective. Demonstrates multi-step planning, task management, and an extensible agent framework. 20k+ stars, active community.

evidence.title: ditto — self-building coding agent
evidence.description: An experimental agent that takes a simple description and autonomously builds a multi-file Flask application via a planner-plus-executor loop. Hands-on multi-agent / tool-use engineering.

evidence.title: GitHub profile — prolific public agent experiments
evidence.description: Public repositories showing consistent, self-initiated work on autonomous agents, knowledge graphs, and LLM tooling over multiple years.

evidence.title: Devpost profile — hackathon agent projects
evidence.description: Public Devpost profile listing hackathon participation and projects centered on AI agents and automation.

evidence.title: Public demos & write-ups on building AI agents
evidence.description: Regularly shares agent experiments, demos, and write-ups publicly — a strong signal of sustained, voluntary interest in autonomous agents.
